title: Cortex
tagline: A reading list that writes itself, and learns what you know.

audience.guidance: Write for an Australia-based reader. Apply an Australian lens where relevant — local bodies and regulation (APRA, ASIC, ATO, RBA, Actuaries Institute), $AUD, ASX / superannuation, Australian health and policy context, AEST timing, and Australian spelling — but do NOT be parochial: cover global affairs and developments too, framed for an Australian reader where it helps. Per tab: Finance leans AU (RBA, ASX, super) while tracking global macro; Actuarial leans AU group life + APRA while tracking IFRS 17 / global practice; Software/AI and Science are mostly global.
